response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music was present, matching the reference JSON's findings. 2. JSON Usage: Fully analyzed scene changes to accurately script the flow of the manual transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely with vocal starts and ends. Truncations are applied during rapid-fire exchanges to keep the reading pace natural and prevent delay accumulation. All dialogue is translated natively in real-time.

subtitles.original: いいでしょ いいでしょ！
subtitles.english: Great, isn't it? Great, isn't it?!

subtitles.original: でも 診察室だけど ベッドは？ベッドどこ？
subtitles.english: But even though it's a clinic... where's the b-bed? Where's the bed?

subtitles.original: あ、なんかパネルのある…
subtitles.english: Ah, there's a panel over there...

subtitles.original: なんかパネルあれなくない？あれ使う？
subtitles.english: Isn't there a panel over there? Shall we use that?

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっとそこ、ダメ！
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, not that one! No!

subtitles.original: え、これダメなの？
subtitles.english: Eh, is this no good?

subtitles.original: そこは、後との面会で使うの！
subtitles.english: We use that for the meetings later!

subtitles.original: えー！何！？面会用！面会用！
subtitles.english: Eh?! What?! For the meetings! For the meetings!

subtitles.original: 面会用？
subtitles.english: For meetings?

subtitles.original: そう、ちょっとね、ベッドとか、ちょっと色々、撮影会とか、シチュエーションドラマとかやろうかなって
subtitles.english: Yes, so, with the bed and all, I thought we could do various things like photo shoots, or situational dramas...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマ？！
subtitles.english: Situational drama?!

subtitles.original: とんでもないことしようとしてる！
subtitles.english: She's trying to do something outrageous!

subtitles.original: 本当だよ！
subtitles.english: Seriously!

subtitles.original: いやそうなんですよ。まあ、でもそれは置いておいて
subtitles.english: Well, that's how it is. But putting that aside...

subtitles.original: あ、置いておくんだ。
subtitles.english: Ah, you're putting it aside.

subtitles.original: ちょっと今回は、二人に撮影をしてもらいたいので
subtitles.english: This time, I'd like the two of you to do the shooting.

subtitles.original: まずは…
subtitles.english: First...

subtitles.original: ラミ様には、カメラを！
subtitles.english: Lamy-sama gets the camera!

subtitles.original: え、本格的な！すごい、カメラ来た！
subtitles.english: Whoa, a professional one! Amazing, a camera's here!

subtitles.original: そしてノエル様にはこちらの、じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: And for Noel-sama, this one, ta-da!

subtitles.original: なんだいこれ？
subtitles.english: What is this?

subtitles.original: ちょこのギリギリを守るために、特別に作られたモザイク棒です！
subtitles.english: To protect Choco's limits, it's a specially made mosaic bar!

subtitles.original: 特別！モザイク棒来た！
subtitles.english: Special! A mosaic bar is here!

subtitles.original: ボタンで、このモザイクの粗さを変えれるらしい！
subtitles.english: Apparently you can change the pixelation of this mosaic with a button!

subtitles.original: 今めっちゃ粗くなってるから。 / あ、本当、薄くできる！
subtitles.english: Because right now it's super pixelated. / Ah, really, we can make it lighter!

subtitles.original: 本当だ！
subtitles.english: Really!

subtitles.original: すげえ。でも粗い方がむしろいいまであるな、これ。
subtitles.english: Amazing. But the pixelated one might actually be better, honestly.

subtitles.original: 確かに。
subtitles.english: Indeed.

subtitles.original: 隠すよ、これ大丈夫かな？でも配信ね、ちょっと守りますよ。
subtitles.english: I'll hide it. Is this okay? But we'll protect the stream.

subtitles.original: ちょこの配信を守ってください！
subtitles.english: Please protect Choco's stream!

subtitles.original: 頑張ります！
subtitles.english: We'll do our best!

subtitles.original: それでは撮影会、スタート！
subtitles.english: Well then, let the photo shoot begin!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！まずはやっぱり全身？そうだね。
subtitles.english: Yay! First, a full-body shot, of course? Yeah.

subtitles.original: 普通にね、ちょっとポーズ。いつものちょこ先生の…
subtitles.english: Just a normal pose. The usual Choco-sensei...

subtitles.original: こんな感じ？
subtitles.english: Like this?

subtitles.original: ああ！美しい！
subtitles.english: Ah! Beautiful!

subtitles.original: 美しい！あ、いい、いい。
subtitles.english: Beautiful! Ah, nice, nice.

subtitles.original: え、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Eh, cute!

subtitles.original: もうここ、ちょっと不味いんじゃない？不味いかな…
subtitles.english: Wait, isn't this already getting a bit dangerous? Is it bad?

subtitles.original: 逆に？逆に？
subtitles.english: In reverse? In reverse?

subtitles.original: ノリノリなんですけど！
subtitles.english: You are totally into it!

subtitles.original: 不味いかな？ちょっと、ちょっとね。ここ揺れてる。
subtitles.english: Is it bad? Just a little, just a little. It's shaking here.

subtitles.original: モザイク、モザイクが追いついてない！
subtitles.english: The mosaic, the mosaic can't keep up!

subtitles.original: 追いついてない！
subtitles.english: It's not keeping up!

subtitles.original: ノエル様頑張って！
subtitles.english: Noel-sama, do your best!

subtitles.original: こうやってね。あ、こういう感じで。
subtitles.english: Like this. Ah, like this, right?

subtitles.original: ちょっとジャンプしてもらい、見てもらっても、ジャンプ確かに。
subtitles.english: Can you try jumping? Let's see. Jumping, indeed.

subtitles.original: えい！
subtitles.english: Ei!

subtitles.original: あ、揺れる！めっちゃ揺れる！あかん、これあかんでしょ、これ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's shaking! It's shaking so much! No, this is bad, right?!

subtitles.original: あい、あい、おい！
subtitles.english: Ai, ai, oi!

subtitles.original: あら。
subtitles.english: Oh my.

subtitles.original: せっかくだから椅子とかも座っちゃう？
subtitles.english: Since we're here, should we sit on the chair?

subtitles.original: 椅子ね、ここに。はーい。
subtitles.english: The chair, over here. Okaay.

subtitles.original: おお、いいですね。靴も可愛い！なんかちょっと青っぽいんだね。
subtitles.english: Oh, nice. The shoes are cute too! They're kind of blueish.

subtitles.original: そう、ちょこね、そこが赤なの。
subtitles.english: Yes, Choco's, the bottom is red.

subtitles.original: ええ！！あ、不味い！
subtitles.english: Eh?! Ah, dangerous!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！そこがね、赤なの。これ。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Yeah, that part's red. This.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、でも何か見えてないからね。大丈夫、大丈夫。
subtitles.english: It's okay, nothing is visible. Safe, safe.

subtitles.original: 守ってます、チャンネル守ってます！
subtitles.english: We're protecting it, protecting the channel!

subtitles.original: じゃあ今度は、上を、上を見てもらって。あ、いいね。
subtitles.english: Now, can we look up? Ah, nice.

subtitles.original: あら、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Oh, cute!

subtitles.original: 見えてる？見えてるよ、見えてるよ！
subtitles.english: Can you see? We can see, we can see!

subtitles.original: 見えてる？可愛い！いい、いい。
subtitles.english: Can you see? Cute! Nice, nice.

subtitles.original: あ、ちなみにラミさん。
subtitles.english: Ah, by the way, Lamy-san...

subtitles.original: あれですよ、この椅子に座って先生ポーズも希望しますけど。
subtitles.english: That's it, we also requested a teacher pose while sitting on the chair.

subtitles.original: そう！先生ポーズとってほしい！
subtitles.english: Yes! I want you to strike a teacher pose!

subtitles.original: 先生ポーズって何だ？こんな感じ？
subtitles.english: What is a teacher pose? Like this?

subtitles.original: ああ、いい！いいですね、いい！非常に。
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! It is very good, very! Extremely.

subtitles.original: モザイクいらないね、これには。非常に。
subtitles.english: We don't need the mosaic for this. Extremely.

subtitles.original: 非常にいらない？いや、わからない。ちょこ先生の魅力が溢れすぎてて。
subtitles.english: Extremely unnecessary? Well, I don't know. Choco-sensei's charm is overflowing too much.

subtitles.original: いいですね、素晴らしい。
subtitles.english: Nice, wonderful.

subtitles.original: じゃあ団長もいいですか？何なに？お尻ふりふりをちょっと、していただきたいんで。
subtitles.english: Is the commander good with it too? What, what? I'd like to have her shake her hips a bit.

subtitles.original: ふりふり、そう、後ろ向いてもらって。
subtitles.english: Shake-shake, yeah, turn your back to us.

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだけど、ふりふり。あ、いいね！
subtitles.english: Even through the lab coat, shake-shake. Ah, nice!

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだが、あの隙に…
subtitles.english: It's through the lab coat, but in that gap...

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと、スカート結構際どい。
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, the skirt is pretty close to the edge.

subtitles.original: これ、白衣って、脱げ、脱いでほしいんだけど、これ脱げないの？
subtitles.english: Wait, the lab coat, can't you take it off? I want you to take it off.

subtitles.original: 脱げるけど、面会で、って言ってた。
subtitles.english: I can take it off, but they said for the meetings.

subtitles.original: あ、面会なら脱いでくれるんですね！
subtitles.english: Ah, so you'll take it off for the meetings!

subtitles.original: じゃあ逆にまた、ココ会長リスペクトということで、ガニ股、ガニ股好きなので。
subtitles.english: In that case, showing respect to Coco-kaichou, I love the bowlegged stance, so a bowlegged one.

subtitles.original: ガニ股？ガニ股！
subtitles.english: Bowlegged? Bowlegged!

subtitles.original: いいね！ガニ股助かる！ガニ股！
subtitles.english: Nice! Bowlegged is a lifesaver! Bowlegged!

subtitles.original: これちょっとモザイク、モザイク！
subtitles.english: Wait, a bit of mosaic, mosaic!

subtitles.original: ちょっと見えてるもんな、モザイクお願いします。
subtitles.english: We can see it a bit, so mosaic please!

subtitles.original: モザイクがむしろここが…逆にやばい！やばいやばいやばい！
subtitles.english: The mosaic is rather... On the contrary, it's bad! Bad, bad, bad!

subtitles.original: 可愛い。ふぅ。
subtitles.english: Cute. Whew.

subtitles.original: どんどん行こう、どんどん行こう。
subtitles.english: Let's keep going, let's keep going.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ラストは、やっぱアイドルだからさ、ちょこ先生。アイドル、とびきり可愛いアイドル、お願いします！
subtitles.english: Well, for the last one, you are an idol after all, Choco-sensei. An idol, the ultimate cute idol, please!

subtitles.original: はい！え、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Yes! Eh, cute!
